chunk_text:
Residential Rental Agreement (Sample Document)
This Rental Agreement is made between the Landlord and the Tenant. This document is a simple
example contract that can be used to test document uploading, processing, and AI question
answering in the Legal AI Platform.
1. Parties
The Landlord agrees to rent the property located at 10 Example Street, and the Tenant agrees to
pay rent under the terms defined in this agreement.
2. Rent Payment
The Tenant agrees to pay a monthly rent of 1200 USD on the first day of each month.
3. Late Payment
If the rent is not paid within 5 days of the due date, a late fee of 50 USD may be applied.
4. Security Deposit
The Tenant shall pay a refundable security deposit equal to one month of rent.
5. Maintenance

a late fee of 50 USD may be applied.
4. Security Deposit
The Tenant shall pay a refundable security deposit equal to one month of rent.
5. Maintenance
The Tenant agrees to maintain the property in good condition and notify the Landlord of any
damages or repairs required.
6. Termination
Either party may terminate the agreement with a 30-day written notice.
